inputs.text: Meri tabiyat bahut kharab hai, bukhar bahut tezi se chadha hai aur bahut bad headaches ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset of fever and headache

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: High fever and headache are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Although fever and headache are common in dengue, other symptoms are not present yet

inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho rahi hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and joint pain are common in Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain is a key symptom of dengue, but other symptoms are still missing

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Although viral fever can cause body aches, the presence of retro-orbital pain is less common

inputs.text: Bukhar kam ho gayi hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The presence of rash, bleeding gums, and drop in fever are cardinal signs of dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever does not typically cause bleeding gums or a rash

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria does not typically cause retro-orbital pain or bleeding gums

inputs.text: Mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, masoodon se khoon abhi bhi aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The presence of bleeding gums, weakness, and blood-tinged sputum confirm dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the presence of specific dengue symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the absence of typical malaria symptoms
